item.description: Massive crowds are expected to gather for a dayslong funeral for Iran’s former Supreme Leader, Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a U.S. strike on the first day of the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Preparations Underway for Funeral of Iran’s Supreme Leader
media:content.media:description: Massive crowds are expected to gather for a dayslong funeral for Iran’s former Supreme Leader, Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a U.S. strike on the first day of the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

item.title: Preparations Underway for Funeral of Iran’s Supreme Leader

item.dc:creator: Dan De Luce
Natasha Lebedeva
item.description: U.S. officials were concerned that Israel might try to assassinate Iran’s negotiators during recent ceasefire talks and Tehran was warned about the possible threat, according to a U.S. official and an Iranian official with knowledge of the matter.

media:content.media:text: Abbas Araghchi
media:content.media:description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrives to meet his Iraqi counterpart Fouad Hussein in Baghdad on June 28.

media:content.media:text: From left, Abbas Araghchi, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Omani Foreign Minister Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi arrive in Oman on June 22.
media:content.media:description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrives to meet his Iraqi counterpart Fouad Hussein in Baghdad on June 28.

item.title: U.S. was concerned Israel might try to kill Iran negotiators, sources say

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: In a speech marking America’s 250th anniversary, New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani rejected President Donald Trump’s view of the nation, and especially its immigrants, without naming him directly.

media:content.media:text: Mayor Mamdani Commemorates America's 250th Anniversary
media:content.media:description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani during a speech to commemorate America's 250th anniversary in New York on July 3, 2026.

item.title: Mamdani offers a contrast to Trump’s vision for America in a 250th anniversary address

item.dc:creator: Elmira Aliieva
item.description: A rare copy of the Declaration of Independence lost for 250 years has been discovered in London, where it is now the only known example of its kind outside the United States.

media:content.media:text: The copy of the 'Exeter Declaration' found at The National Archives.
media:content.media:description: A rare 1776 printing of the US Declaration of Independence discovered at The National Archives in Kew, London.

media:content.media:credit: The National Archives / Prize Papers Project
media:content.media:text: Letters from the Prize Papers collection, taken from ships (prizes) captured by the Royal Navy and British privateers between 1652 and 1815.
media:content.media:description: A rare 1776 printing of the US Declaration of Independence discovered at The National Archives in Kew, London.

item.title: Rare copy of the Declaration of Independence seized by the British in 1776 is found

item.description: ¡Locura total al minuto 93! Rafael Leão mandó un centro con comba perfecta desde la banda izquierda y Gonçalo Ramos conectó un brutal giro de cuello para clavar el balón en las redes, sellando el 2-1 de Portugal sobre Croacia en el cierre del encuentro.

media:content.media:title: ¡Golazo de Gonçalo Ramos al 93' pone en ventaja a Portugal!
media:content.media:description: ¡Locura total al minuto 93! Rafael Leão mandó un centro con comba perfecta desde la banda izquierda y Gonçalo Ramos conectó un brutal giro de cuello para clavar el balón en las redes, sellando el 2-1 de Portugal sobre Croacia en el cierre del encuentro.

item.title: ¡Golazo de Gonçalo Ramos al 93' pone en ventaja a Portugal!

item.description: Australia pone en igualdad el marcador y los aficionados mantienen la esperanza de avanzar a los octavos de final. El ganador de este encuentro enfrentará a Argentina o Cabo Verde.

media:content.media:title: La hinchada enloquece con el autogol de Hany y Australia lo empata en Dallas
media:content.media:description: Australia pone en igualdad el marcador y los aficionados mantienen la esperanza de avanzar a los octavos de final. El ganador de este encuentro enfrentará a Argentina o Cabo Verde.

item.title: La hinchada enloquece con el autogol de Hany y Australia lo empata en Dallas

item.description: ara mala fortuna de Egipto, llegó el empate 1-1, un gol que cambia por completo el panorama en la lucha por un boleto a los octavos de final de la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Un autogol de Mohamed Hany le da el empate a Austalia
media:content.media:description: ara mala fortuna de Egipto, llegó el empate 1-1, un gol que cambia por completo el panorama en la lucha por un boleto a los octavos de final de la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Un autogol de Mohamed Hany le da el empate a Austalia

item.description: Egipto enciende las emociones con el gol de Ashour que abre el marcador ante los Socceroos. El entrenador, Hossam Hassan pide mesura ante la momentánea ventaja de los Faraones del Nilo.

media:content.media:title: Las faraones despiertan y los aficionados celebran el gol de Ashour sobre Australia
media:content.media:description: Egipto enciende las emociones con el gol de Ashour que abre el marcador ante los Socceroos. El entrenador, Hossam Hassan pide mesura ante la momentánea ventaja de los Faraones del Nilo.

item.title: Las faraones despiertan y los aficionados celebran el gol de Ashour sobre Australia

item.description: Un potente remate de cabeza permitió al conjunto de los faraones adelantarse en Dallas, Texas.

media:content.media:title: Emam Ashour abre el marcador para Egipto ante Australia
media:content.media:description: Un potente remate de cabeza permitió al conjunto de los faraones adelantarse en Dallas, Texas.

item.title: Emam Ashour abre el marcador para Egipto ante Australia

item.description: Enzo Fernández recuerda cómo cumplir el sueño de disputar y ganar el Mundial de Qatar 2022 transformó su carrera. El mediocampista argentino también revela por qué siente que su convocatoria llegó en el momento perfecto.

media:content.media:title: Enzo Fernández: “Un Mundial cambió mi vida para siempre” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Enzo Fernández recuerda cómo cumplir el sueño de disputar y ganar el Mundial de Qatar 2022 transformó su carrera. El mediocampista argentino también revela por qué siente que su convocatoria llegó en el momento perfecto.

item.title: Enzo Fernández: “Un Mundial cambió mi vida para siempre” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Revive la histórica semifinal del Mundial Italia 1990, cuando Argentina eliminó al anfitrión en la tanda de penales para avanzar a la final. Una noche inolvidable con Sergio Goycochea como gran héroe bajo los tres palos.

media:content.media:title: Un día como hoy: Argentina silenció a Italia en su casa | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Revive la histórica semifinal del Mundial Italia 1990, cuando Argentina eliminó al anfitrión en la tanda de penales para avanzar a la final. Una noche inolvidable con Sergio Goycochea como gran héroe bajo los tres palos.

item.title: Un día como hoy: Argentina silenció a Italia en su casa | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Australia es la única selección de la Conferencia Asiática de Fútbol en el Mundial, quiere representar con autoridad a la región ante Egipto que parte como favorito.

media:content.media:title: ¡Sin miedo! Australia está preparándose para seguir avanzando en la Copa Mundial
media:content.media:description: Australia es la única selección de la Conferencia Asiática de Fútbol en el Mundial, quiere representar con autoridad a la región ante Egipto que parte como favorito.

item.title: ¡Sin miedo! Australia está preparándose para seguir avanzando en la Copa Mundial

item.description: Gran Mundial 2026 el que están firmando ambas selecciones de la CONMEBOL. Aunque la fase de eliminación directa eleva la dificultad, ¿por qué no ilusionarse con un cruce entre ambas?

media:content.media:title: ¿Colombia vs. Argentina en las Semifinales del Mundial? TODO es posible
media:content.media:description: Gran Mundial 2026 el que están firmando ambas selecciones de la CONMEBOL. Aunque la fase de eliminación directa eleva la dificultad, ¿por qué no ilusionarse con un cruce entre ambas?

item.title: ¿Colombia vs. Argentina en las Semifinales del Mundial? TODO es posible

item.description: Los micrófonos de Telemundo captaron de cerca el banderazo de la afición argentina, donde se vivió un ambiente espectacular.

media:content.media:title: Argentinos agradecen a España por "dejar" jugar a Messi con la Albiceleste
media:content.media:description: Los micrófonos de Telemundo captaron de cerca el banderazo de la afición argentina, donde se vivió un ambiente espectacular.

item.title: Argentinos agradecen a España por "dejar" jugar a Messi con la Albiceleste

item.description: La selección de Egipto ya llegó al Estadio de Dallas, donde enfrentará a Australia en los dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Los Faraones ultiman detalles antes de buscar su pase a los octavos de final.

media:content.media:title: Los Faraones ya pisan el Estadio de Dallas para enfrentar a Australia
media:content.media:description: La selección de Egipto ya llegó al Estadio de Dallas, donde enfrentará a Australia en los dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Los Faraones ultiman detalles antes de buscar su pase a los octavos de final.

item.title: Los Faraones ya pisan el Estadio de Dallas para enfrentar a Australia

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: The best 4th of July sales are happening now. Our editors found worthwhile deals on Apple, Yeti, Medicube and more.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

item.title: The best 4th of July sales to shop before the holiday weekend

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Gabriella Bachara
Corky Siemaszko
item.description: An 18-month Arizona boy was pronounced dead after a near-drowning but was found breathing nearly six hours later in a hospital morgue.

media:content.media:text: Arizona toddler declared dead was found alive in a morgue
media:content.media:description: Vincent Fiordilino.

item.title: Arizona toddler declared dead was found alive in the morgue

item.dc:creator: Dan De Luce
Natasha Lebedeva
item.description: U.S. officials were concerned that Israel might try to assassinate Iran’s negotiators during recent ceasefire talks and Tehran was warned about the possible threat, according to a U.S. official and an Iranian official with knowledge of the matter.

media:content.media:text: Abbas Araghchi
media:content.media:description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrives to meet his Iraqi counterpart Fouad Hussein in Baghdad on June 28.

media:content.media:text: From left, Abbas Araghchi, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Omani Foreign Minister Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi arrive in Oman on June 22.
media:content.media:description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrives to meet his Iraqi counterpart Fouad Hussein in Baghdad on June 28.

item.title: U.S. was concerned Israel might try to kill Iran negotiators, sources say

item.dc:creator: Erin McGarry
item.description: A record-setting heat wave is blanketing much of the United States as millions of Americans gather for Independence Day, prompting the cancellation of events marking America’s 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Heat Dome Settles Over US Bringing Hot And Humid Conditions To Millions Of Americans
media:content.media:description: People cool themselves with water bottles during the Great American State Fair on the National Mall on July 2.

item.title: Record-breaking heat disrupts America’s 250th birthday celebrations and travel

item.dc:creator: Ashley Mowreader
Saba Hamedy
item.description: Across 16 albums, the pop superstar’s lyrics have traced a journey from romance and heartbreak to marriage, lasting commitment and a new chapter with Travis Kelce.

media:content.media:text: A hand-drawn map of Taylor Swift's Manhattan points of interest mentioned in her songs.
A hand-drawn map of Taylor Swift's Manhattan points of interest mentioned in her songs.
A hand-drawn map of Taylor Swift's Manhattan points of interest mentioned in her songs.

item.title: Graphics: The evolution of Taylor Swift’s music

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: In a speech marking America’s 250th anniversary, New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani rejected President Donald Trump’s view of the nation, and especially its immigrants, without naming him directly.

media:content.media:text: Mayor Mamdani Commemorates America's 250th Anniversary
media:content.media:description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani during a speech to commemorate America's 250th anniversary in New York on July 3, 2026.

item.title: Mamdani offers a contrast to Trump’s vision for America in a 250th anniversary address

item.dc:creator: Mark Hodge
item.description: Portugal advanced after edging out Croatia 2-1 in a hard-fought match, and Cristiano Ronaldo’s team will now face European champion Spain on Monday.

media:content.media:text: Portugal v Croatia: Round Of 32 - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Cristiano Ronaldo of Portugal after scoring against Croatia at Toronto Stadium on July 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Portugal v Croatia: Round Of 32 - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Cristiano Ronaldo of Portugal after scoring against Croatia at Toronto Stadium on July 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi #10 of Argentina celebrates scoring his team's third goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group J match between Jordan and Argentina at Dallas Stadium on June 27, 2026 in Arlington, Texas.
media:content.media:description: Cristiano Ronaldo of Portugal after scoring against Croatia at Toronto Stadium on July 2, 2026.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Portugal advances, Croatia sent packing after dramatic finish

item.dc:creator: Elmira Aliieva
item.description: A rare copy of the Declaration of Independence lost for 250 years has been discovered in London, where it is now the only known example of its kind outside the United States.

media:content.media:text: The copy of the 'Exeter Declaration' found at The National Archives.
media:content.media:description: A rare 1776 printing of the US Declaration of Independence discovered at The National Archives in Kew, London.

media:content.media:credit: The National Archives / Prize Papers Project
media:content.media:text: Letters from the Prize Papers collection, taken from ships (prizes) captured by the Royal Navy and British privateers between 1652 and 1815.
media:content.media:description: A rare 1776 printing of the US Declaration of Independence discovered at The National Archives in Kew, London.

item.title: Rare copy of the Declaration of Independence seized by the British in 1776 is found

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: With England’s game against Mexico at the Azteca stadium kicking off at 1 a.m. British time, the government has relaxed alcohol laws to allow pubs to stay open.

media:content.media:text: Football Fans Watch England V DR Congo In The 2026 FIFA World Cup
media:content.media:description: England fans watch the England V DR Congo in the 2026 FIFA World Cup at Freight Island on July 1, 2026 in Manchester, England.

media:content.media:text: Football Fans Watch England V Croatia In The 2026 FIFA World Cup
media:content.media:description: An England fan in London celebrates as Harry Kane scores a penalty in the match against Croatia on June 17.

media:content.media:text: Football Fans Watch Panama V England In The 2026 FIFA World Cup
media:content.media:description: England fans in London react as they watch the match against Panama on Saturday.

item.title: England fans can drink till 5 a.m. for Mexico World Cup game after government intervenes
